title: When item created in this group, create group in another board
excerpt:
I want to know if this is somehow possible: 
When ITEM CREATED in this GROUP, CREATE a GROUP in that BOARD 
The new group should have the same name as the item i have created in that other board. 
thx for help!

posts.author: Geserit (Christopher Jeckl)
